title: White & Pink Hen Party Latex Balloons (22cm) Pack of 10 - Fun & Stylish Celebration Decorations
features: HEN PARTY LATEX BALLOONS: Add a touch of fun and glamour to your special celebration with our premium white & pink hen party latex balloons; perfect for creating a memorable atmosphere for the bride-to-be and her squad.

WHITE & PINK DESIGN: These stylish balloons come in a vibrant mix of white and pink, making them the perfect accessory to complement your hen party decorations and add a dash of elegance to any venue.
PACK OF 10 BALLOONS: This pack includes 10 high-quality, 22cm latex balloons, ensuring that you'll have plenty on hand to create a fun, festive environment for your hen party.

VERSATILE SIZE: Our hen party balloons are the ideal size for balloon bouquets, table centerpieces, and room décor; they are easy to inflate and can be filled with air or helium for varied placement options.

FUN & STYLISH DECORATIONS: Elevate the ambiance of your hen party with these eye-catching balloons that help set the tone for a night full of laughter, love, and unforgettable moments with your closest friends.
description: Product Description Create a fabulously festive party scene with these Latex "Hen Party" Balloons. Supplied in an assortment of pretty pink colours, these balloons are a quick way to add bursts of colour to a hen night or bachelorette party. With "Hen Party" lettering printed on one side, these party balloons are designed to be filled with air and hung from the ceiling to ensure the printed text is right-side up. Whether they're placed individually throughout the room or bunched together in balloon bouquets, these latex balloons will be a cheerful addition to the celebration. Box Contains Set of 10 Balloon
